title: IRONWORX® Spectre Nickel Escape Thumb Turn Euro Cylinder Door Lock 50mm (Turn) / 50mm (Key) (100mm) High-Security Police Approved TS007 BSI 1 Star, Anti-Bump, Anti-Pick, Anti-Drill, Anti-Snap, 3X Keys
features: HIGH SECURITY AND PROTECTION: Enhance your home’s security with our Spectre BSI 1-star kitemarked euro cylinder lock. Accredited with Secured by Design (SBD) certification, this police-approved door lock provides excellent theft resistance against common forced methods of attack with anti-pick, anti-drill, anti-bump and anti-snap safeguards, providing effective protection against unauthorised access to your front and back doors.

HIGHLY ACCREDITED AND RIGOROUSLY TESTED: Constructed of specially designed tumblers and hardened pins the IRONWORX Spectre Euro cylinder lock is certified to British industry standards EN 1303 and is Insurance approved. Awarded with TS007 1 Star Kitemark certification, providing a high level of security and protection for your home.

EMERGENCY ESCAPE FUNCTION: Equipped with an internal thumb turn emergency escape function the IRONWORX Spectre Euro cylinder provides a fast, safe and keyless exit - ideal in the case of emergencies or ease of use for children and the elderly for both front and bedroom door lock applications.

SIMPLE INSTALLATION WITH GUARANTEED PERFORMANCE: The IRONWORX Spectre Euro cylinder allows a simple and quick retrofit installation for all door types which accept a Euro cylinder barrel - no special tools required. Available in various lengths and offsets to suit your needs. It includes a 10-year mechanical guarantee (T&C's apply) making it an excellent door lock choice.

TRUSTED BRITISH BRAND COMMITMENT: Our high performing hardware offers reliability and strict quality control. Focused on innovation, IRONWORX provides effective home security solutions for your family and property, whether for front doors or patio doors. IRONWORX is a trusted British brand offering high-quality door locks for your safety and peace of mind.
